title: REPL :get command returns stub instead of actual data
description: After the NucleusEngine→HandleSession swap in lattice-repl.ts, the :get command calls session.getBindings()[arg] which returns a handle stub string (e.g. "$res1: Array(42) [preview...]") instead of the actual data. Previously engine.getBinding(arg) returned the raw value which was formatted via formatValue(value, 5000). Fix: either expose a getBinding() method on HandleSession that delegates to the engine, or use session.expand() in the REPL to retrieve full data for :get.

title: REPL verbose flag silently ignored after HandleSession swap
description: HandleSession's constructor takes no options, so the REPL's --verbose/-v flag no longer has any effect. The NucleusEngine created internally defaults to verbose: false. Fix: add an options parameter to HandleSession constructor that threads verbose through to new NucleusEngine({ verbose }).
